name: B.O.W.
description: Notes A unique weapon that was one of two introduced to showcase the new burst-fire function (along with S.T.A.F.F.), which causes the weapon to fire a certain number of shots before needing to pause for a certain amount of time. The time between the bursts can be decreased (up to a cap) through anything that increases fire rate, such as DEX or the Berserk buff.
effects: Burst: Fires a burst of shots, with the delay between bursts decreasing with your DEX and status effects Burst Count: 3 Maximum Burst Delay: 1 second Minimum Burst Delay: 0.6 seconds Shots hit multiple targets
